testcase.name: MON-01: Parent roles must have >= permissions of child roles
testcase.system-out: >>> MR recorded: MON-01 PASS (1ms) timestamp = 2026-04-06T18:01:23.389251, MonotonicityBasedMRs:MON-01: Parent roles must have >= permissions of child roles = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 5 | # of calls to property checks = 5 | # of not rejected calls generation = EXHAUSTIVE | parameters are exhaustively generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 0 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 0 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = -3643153703396672045 | random seed to reproduce generated values

testcase.name: cumulativePermissionAddition
